ham: Hey! Swiggy se aapke next 2 orders par 30% off ka offer hai. Code: SWIGGY30. Offer valid till 31/12. Order now and enjoy!
spam: Hey, aapka credit card limit 5 lakh tak increase hua hai! Quick confirmation chaahiye, otherwise limit revert ho sakti hai. Click <URL> abhi for details. Agar 3️⃣ minute mein reply nahi kiya, toh aapke account par lock lag sakta hai. Urgent - reply kare ya <URL> visit kare.
